images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: an automated assembly line inside a dark data center, a row of glowing cream-lit checkmark gates passing a payload along a conveyor toward a single server rack at the end that is fracturing and sparking with thin red fault lines, a lone engineer silhouette standing beside it watching. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition, no text or logos.
